title: Royal Prayer.
content:
Ha, I am the lord of earth! The noble,

    Who're in my service, love me.
    Ha, I am the lord of earth! The noble,

    O'er whom my sway extendeth, love I.
    Oh, grant me, God in Heaven, that I may ne'er

    Dispense with loftiness and love!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, titled "Royal Prayer.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
